title: SDK release playbook (version bump + publish)
desc: Step-by-step release process for kiexpert/wkappbot-sdk. Covers version alignment with dev repo, pre-release checklist, build/test, docs regen, tagging, and post-release verification. PRIVATE: not for public SDK skills/.
steps: TRIGGER: dev repo sync-public.yml pushes to SDK (new minor/major). That push = signal to cut SDK release too.

STEP 1 - Version alignment: SDK WKAppBotBaseVersion should match dev minor version. Dev=6.5 -> SDK Directory.Build.props: <WKAppBotBaseVersion>6.5</WKAppBotBaseVersion>. SDK has no VERSIONING.md or CLAUDE.md version header to update (unlike dev repo which requires 3-file commit).

STEP 2 - Pre-release checklist: (a) dev repo CI green, (b) SDK build-launcher CI green, (c) SDK extended-smoke CI green (<5 hard-fail), (d) Launcher source audit: no hardcoded paths, no API keys (run security-review skill), (e) build.cmd --download-only works (latest dev GitHub Release exists and contains binaries).

STEP 3 - Local build + smoke: cd d:\GitHub\wkappbot-sdk && build.cmd --download-only (fetches latest dev core) && dotnet publish csharp/src/WKAppBot.Launcher/WKAppBot.Launcher.csproj -c Release -p:SkipDeployLauncher=true -o bin && powershell -File scripts/smoke-help.ps1 -BasicOnly
STEP 4 - Docs regeneration: bash scripts/gen-command-ref.sh (updates docs/wkappbot-commands.md from live binary). Commit if changed.

STEP 5 - Release: run scripts/find-stable-release.ps1 -MaxRuns 4. This: finds latest passing artifact -> bundles zip -> tags v{version} -> gh release create --generate-notes. OR manual: git tag v6.5.0 && git push origin v6.5.0 (triggers release.yml workflow).
STEP 6 - Post-release: verify GitHub Release page shows correct assets + auto-generated notes. Trigger extended-smoke.yml manually on the release tag to confirm.
VERSION SCHEME: SDK tag = v{WKAppBotBaseVersion}.{patch}-free. patch = commits since bump commit (auto). If aligning with dev, bump SDK WKAppBotBaseVersion immediately after dev minor bump commit.
PRIVATE NOTE: SDK Core binary comes from dev GitHub Release. SDK Launcher is built from wkappbot-sdk source. They must be version-compatible. Core release must precede SDK release.
SUGGEST/SKILL from SDK: always run D:\GitHub\WKAppBot\bin\wkappbot-core.exe from d:\GitHub\wkappbot-sdk CWD. Never cd to WKAppBot first.

LESSON (2026-04-28 first run): bump WKAppBotBaseVersion BEFORE running find-stable-release.ps1. Script builds from latest artifact + smoke, then tags. Version in binary = 6.5.0.0 (launcher file ver). Core version from downloaded release may differ -- this is expected.

LESSON: find-stable-release.ps1 uses -BasicOnly smoke (25 tests, ~30s). Extended smoke (188 tests) is run separately via extended-smoke.yml CI. Do NOT use full extended mode in release script -- too slow.
author: claude
